note: GitHub API rate limited - data extracted from README
name: awesome-copilot
description: A community-created collection of custom agents, instructions, skills, hooks, workflows, and plugins to supercharge your GitHub Copilot experience
key_features: Agents - Specialized Copilot agents with MCP server integration
Instructions - Coding standards applied automatically by file pattern
Skills - Self-contained folders with instructions and bundled assets
Plugins - Curated bundles of agents and skills for specific workflows
Hooks - Automated actions triggered during Copilot agent sessions
Agentic Workflows - AI-powered GitHub Actions automations in markdown
Cookbook - Copy-paste-ready recipes for Copilot APIs
